---
title: "FIXME"
teaching: 30
exercises: 10
questions:
- "FIXME"
objectives:
- "FIXME"
keypoints:
- "FIXME"
source: Rmd
---


```{r, include=FALSE}
source("../bin/chunk-options.R")
knitr_fig_path("99-")
```

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


{% include links.md %}
